emails.subject: Westinghouse/Gleason Meeting Agenda
emails.body: There's a meeting with a cast of characters to discuss the Westinhouse warranty issues. It is tomorrow (Thurs) at 1230. Do you have any interest in sitting in? Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 08/23/2000 01:06 PM John Normand@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 08/23/2000 01:03 PM

emails.subject: Re: Westinghouse/Gleason Meeting Agenda
emails.body: Re: Westinghouse/Gleason Meeting Agenda Can we get together next week so I can get an update? Twanda will schedule. Kay Mann@ENRON 08/23/2000 01:07 PM

emails.subject: Re: Westinghouse/Gleason Meeting Agenda
emails.body: Re: Westinghouse/Gleason Meeting Agenda Can we get together next week so I can get an update? Twanda will schedule. Kay Mann@ENRON 08/23/2000 01:07 PM

emails.body: Sounds good. Early in the week is better for me. From: Richard B Sanders@ECT on 08/25/2000 06:49 AM
